comment: Build-correctness and rendered-workflow gate: zero-dependency unit tests over the DOM-free episode/preset model, a preview-build smoke check, and a headless Chrome rendered workflow that generates two local WebM files, uploads them through the shipped labelled Host and Guest file controls, confirms bucket assignment, decodes blob-backed video pixels in the composed preview, and verifies the uploaded media survives a preset switch. No seeded product media, committed fixture output, or verifier-only product paths are used.
